Class Material

java.lang.Object
com.pot_pot_golf.Core.Entity.Material
public class Material extends Object
The material class. This class is responsible for the materials of the game.

  • Constructor Details

    • Material

      public Material()
      The constructor of the material. It initializes the colors and the reflectance of the material.

    • Material

      public Material(org.joml.Vector4f color, float reflectance)
      The constructor of the material. It initializes the color and the reflectance of the material.
      Parameters:
      color - The color of the material.
      reflectance - The reflectance of the material.

    • Material

      public Material(org.joml.Vector4f color, float reflectance, Texture texture)
      The constructor of the material. It initializes the color, the reflectance, and the texture of the material.
      Parameters:
      color - The color of the material.
      reflectance - The reflectance of the material.
      texture - The texture of the material.

    • Material

      public Material(Texture texture, float reflectance)
      The constructor of the material.
      Parameters:
      texture - The texture of the material.

    • Material

      public Material(org.joml.Vector4f ambientColor, org.joml.Vector4f diffuseColor, org.joml.Vector4f specularColor, float reflectance, Texture texture)
      The constructor of the material. It initializes the colors, the reflectance, and the texture of the material.
      Parameters:
      ambientColor - The ambient color of the material.
      diffuseColor - The diffuse color of the material.
      specularColor - The specular color of the material.
      reflectance - The reflectance of the material.
      texture - The texture of the material.

    • hasTexture

      public boolean hasTexture()
      Checks if the material has a texture.
      Returns:
      True if the material has a texture, false otherwise.
